what_it_proves: No unique Weyl-role assignment is forced within the audited finite path-algebra representation class (commutant dim 12, GL(3) freedom on the rank-3 trivial isotype) without an additional role-resolution functor.
what_it_does_NOT_prove: That no finite representation reconstruction can ever exist.
admissible_class: finite path *-algebra reps with the declared commutant; no role-resolution functor

what_it_proves: The frozen data supply no canonical intertwiner among L_archive (Laplacian|ker A, spectrum {24,22,20}), QUQ (archive block of the tick U), and S_DE (two-mode); hence no contraction QUQ=psi*V is presently derived, and w(z) is underdetermined (w_A != w_B).
what_it_does_NOT_prove: That QUQ itself is non-contractive; the L_archive spectrum is NOT the QUQ spectrum.
admissible_class: frozen L_archive, QUQ, S_DE without a canonical intertwiner

what_it_proves: No phi^3 Perron carrier arises as an inherited adjacency compression, restriction, or subgraph transfer of the frozen K(9,11,13) adjacency A (avg-degree Rayleigh bound rho(A) >= 718/33 > phi^3).
what_it_does_NOT_prove: That scene-native path refinement, projective cylinder history, conditional-expectation tower, graded product carrier, or profinite history functor cannot produce phi^3.

what_it_proves: Within the admissible symmetry group that CONTAINS the block swap, no canonical block-to-generation assignment is forced (sigmaA != sigmaB both order 12, same det/cycle type); the finite Green resolvent is already closed and the branch-index->operator shortcut is closed-negative.
what_it_does_NOT_prove: That a branch-sensitive selector cannot exist if the admissible symmetry group EXCLUDES the swap.
admissible_class: block assignments under an admissible symmetry group containing the (4,3) block swap

what_it_proves: The present canonical phi-ladder tower is trace-class with zero log-Cesaro coefficient, and the a=3 candidate limit 1/(3 log phi) != mu2 UNDER the declared Lindemann/log-phi bridge assumption (ASSUMP-LINDEMANN-LNPHI).
what_it_does_NOT_prove: That all possible future profinite analytic realizations are refuted; the result is conditional on the bridge assumption, never unconditional CORE.
admissible_class: present phi-ladder tower + a=3 candidate; conditional on ASSUMP-LINDEMANN-LNPHI
